query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `api_keys` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `keyHash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `keyPrefix` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
  `createdByUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `lastUsedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `api_keys_keyHash_unique` (`keyHash`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4QE1i3LPsxu4CUm.root --database emCAipNpTbMAUBXoZXdNuB --execute 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `api_keys` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `keyHash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `keyPrefix` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
  `createdByUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `lastUsedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `api_keys_keyHash_unique` (`keyHash`)
);
